{"key_event":"Security expansion and Yellow Vest backlash","reasoning":"France’s state capacity rose modestly as counterterrorism laws, emergency powers, surveillance, and executive-centered reforms strengthened coercive and administrative authority despite eurozone fiscal constraints and legitimacy strains. Civil society remained very strong but slipped slightly: unions and traditional parties weakened, social cohesion frayed, and mobilization became more fragmented, even as Yellow Vests and digital protest showed continuing disruptive power.","society_change":-0.3,"society_power":8.5,"state_change":0.2,"state_power":8.8}
